feed.text: Checkout flow uses optimistic cart updates — server reconciles on the /confirm step
Stripe webhook retries are idempotent via the event id stored in payments table
Decision: cache product listings at the edge for 60s, revalidate on inventory change
confirm.post.ts validates the cart total against live prices before charging
Coupon stacking is disabled — only the highest-value discount applies per order
Added guest checkout: session cart promotes to an order without an account
Fixed: race condition double-charged when the pay button was double-clicked
Extracted pricing math into lib/pricing.ts — shared by cart, checkout, and admin
Tax is computed server-side per region; the client only ever displays the result
Checkout hardening committed and pushed to main (a3f19c2)
DECISIONS.md updated with the pricing, coupon, and guest-checkout rules

notes: Access 92k tokens of past research & decisions for just 14,320t. Use the claude-mem skill to access memories by ID.
